contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 1
contoh.q:
Diketahui matriks $A = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & 3 & 1 \\ 4 & 0 & -3 \end{bmatrix}$.

(a) Tentukan ordo matriks $A$.   (b) Sebutkan unsur baris ke-1.   (c) Sebutkan unsur kolom ke-2.
contoh.p:
(a) Matriks $A$ berordo $\mathbf{(2 \times 3)}$.

(b) Unsur baris ke-1 adalah $2, 3, 1$.

(c) Unsur kolom ke-2 adalah $3$ dan $0$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 3
contoh.q: Diketahui matriks $A = \begin{bmatrix} r & 7 \\ 2p-3 & 2r \end{bmatrix}$ dan $B = \begin{bmatrix} 2q & p+3q \\ 5 & 2r \end{bmatrix}$. Jika $A = B$, tentukan nilai $r$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 4
contoh.q: Diketahui matriks $A = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & -2 & b \\ 1 & 4 & d \\ 0 & 2b & 6c \end{bmatrix}$ dan $B = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & 1 & 0 \\ -2 & 4 & 6 \\ 3c & d & 4d \end{bmatrix}$. Jika $A = B^{\mathrm{T}}$, tentukan elemen matriks $A$ baris ke-2 kolom ke-3.
contoh.p: $A = B^{\mathrm{T}}$ berarti $A = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & -2 & 3c \\ 1 & 4 & d \\ 0 & 6 & 4d \end{bmatrix}$. $$\begin{align*} 2b &= 6 \;\Rightarrow\; b = 3 \\ b &= 3c \;\Rightarrow\; 3 = 3c \;\Rightarrow\; c = 1 \\ 6c &= 4d \;\Rightarrow\; 6(1) = 4d \;\Rightarrow\; d = \tfrac{3}{2} \end{align*}$$ Jadi elemen baris ke-2 kolom ke-3 adalah $d = \mathbf{\dfrac{3}{2}}$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 5
contoh.q:
Diketahui $A = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & -5 \\ 3 & -1 \end{bmatrix}$, $B = \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 4 \\ -2 & -6 \end{bmatrix}$, $C = \begin{bmatrix} -3 & 4 \\ 2 & -2 \end{bmatrix}$. Hitunglah:
(a) $A + B - C$   (b) $A - (B + C)$   (c) $(A - B) - (A - C) + (B + C)$
contoh.p:
(a) $A + B - C = \begin{bmatrix} 2+0-(-3) & -5+4-4 \\ 3+(-2)-2 & -1+(-6)-(-2) \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & -5 \\ -1 & -5 \end{bmatrix}$

(b) $A - (B + C) = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & -5 \\ 3 & -1 \end{bmatrix} - \begin{bmatrix} -3 & 8 \\ 0 & -8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & -13 \\ 3 & 7 \end{bmatrix}$

(c) $(A - B) - (A - C) + (B + C) = A - B - A + C + B + C = 2C = \begin{bmatrix} -6 & 8 \\ 4 & -4 \end{bmatrix}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 8
contoh.p: $$\begin{bmatrix} x+3y & 9 \\ 3x+2 & 6+z \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 3+4x & 9 \\ 8 & 2y \end{bmatrix}$$ Dari kesamaan elemen: $$\begin{align*} 3x + 2 &= 8 \;\Rightarrow\; x = 2 \\ x + 3y &= 3 + 4x \;\Rightarrow\; 2 + 3y = 11 \;\Rightarrow\; y = 3 \\ 6 + z &= 2y = 6 \;\Rightarrow\; z = 0 \end{align*}$$ Jadi $x = 2$, $y = 3$, $z = 0$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 12
contoh.p: Lakukan perkalian matriks ruas kiri: $$\begin{bmatrix} 6y+2x & -2y-4x \\ -8 & 1 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 3x+4 & -10 \\ -8 & z \end{bmatrix}$$ Dari kesamaan elemen: $$\begin{align*} z &= 1 \\ -2y - 4x &= -10 \;\Rightarrow\; y + 2x = 5 \\ 6y + 2x &= 3x + 4 \;\Rightarrow\; 6y - x = 4 \end{align*}$$ Dari $y = 5 - 2x$ disubstitusi ke $6y - x = 4$: $$6(5 - 2x) - x = 4 \;\Rightarrow\; 30 - 13x = 4 \;\Rightarrow\; x = 2, \quad y = 1$$ Jadi $x = 2$, $y = 1$, $z = 1$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 16
contoh.q: Tentukan determinan $B = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 & 3 \\ 4 & 5 & 6 \\ 7 & 8 & 0 \end{bmatrix}$ dengan ekspansi kofaktor baris pertama.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 17
contoh.p: Penyelesaian (ekspansi baris pertama): $$\begin{align*} x \begin{vmatrix} x & 1 \\ 0 & x \end{vmatrix} - 1 \begin{vmatrix} 2 & 1 \\ 1 & x \end{vmatrix} + 0 &= 0 \\ x(x^2 - 0) - 1(2x - 1) &= 0 \\ x^3 - 2x + 1 &= 0 \\ (x-1)(x^2+x-1) &= 0 \end{align*}$$ $x = 1$ atau $x = \dfrac{-1 \pm \sqrt{5}}{2}$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 19
contoh.q:
Tentukan invers setiap matriks berikut dan verifikasi hasilnya:
(a) $A = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & 5 \\ 1 & 3 \end{bmatrix}$   (b) $B = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & 4 \\ 3 & 5 \end{bmatrix}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 21
contoh.p: $$\begin{align*} (A \times B)^{-1} \times A &= B^{-1} \times A^{-1} \times A = B^{-1} \times I = B^{-1} \\ \det(B) &= (3)(3) - (2)(4) = 1 \\ B^{-1} &= \begin{bmatrix} 3 & -2 \\ -4 & 3 \end{bmatrix} \end{align*}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 22
contoh.q: Jika matriks $A = \begin{bmatrix} x-4 & 6-x \\ 3 & x-2 \end{bmatrix}$ merupakan matriks singular, tentukan nilai $x$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 23
contoh.q: Matriks $A = \begin{bmatrix} 5 & -2 \\ 6 & -2 \end{bmatrix}$ adalah invers dari matriks $B = \begin{bmatrix} -1 & x+y \\ 2x+1 & 5/2 \end{bmatrix}$. Tentukan nilai $x$ dan $y$.
contoh.p: $A^{-1} = B$. Hitung $A^{-1}$: $$\det(A) = (5)(-2)-(-2)(6) = -10+12 = 2, \quad A^{-1} = \frac{1}{2}\begin{bmatrix} -2 & 2 \\ -6 & 5 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} -1 & 1 \\ -3 & \frac{5}{2} \end{bmatrix}$$ Dari kesamaan elemen dengan $B$: $$2x + 1 = -3 \;\Rightarrow\; x = -2; \qquad x + y = 1 \;\Rightarrow\; -2 + y = 1 \;\Rightarrow\; y = 3$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 25
contoh.p:
Dari $A \times C \times B = D$, maka $B = C^{-1} \times A^{-1} \times D$.

Langkah 1: $\det(A) = (2)(-3) - (-1)(4) = -2$, $\quad A^{-1} = \begin{bmatrix} \frac{3}{2} & -\frac{1}{2} \\ 2 & -1 \end{bmatrix}$

Langkah 2: $\det(C) = (3)(1) - (2)(2) = -1$, $\quad C^{-1} = \begin{bmatrix} -1 & 2 \\ 2 & -3 \end{bmatrix}$

Langkah 3: $A^{-1} \times D = \begin{bmatrix} \frac{3}{2} & -\frac{1}{2} \\ 2 & -1 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 0 & 4 \\ -2 & 2 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & 5 \\ 2 & 6 \end{bmatrix}$

Langkah 4: $B = C^{-1} \times (A^{-1} \times D) = \begin{bmatrix} -1 & 2 \\ 2 & -3 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 5 \\ 2 & 6 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 3 & 7 \\ -4 & -8 \end{bmatrix}$

Verifikasi: $A \times C \times B = \begin{bmatrix} 4 & 3 \\ 6 & 5 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 3 & 7 \\ -4 & -8 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 0 & 4 \\ -2 & 2 \end{bmatrix} = D$ ✓

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 26
contoh.q: Diketahui $B = \begin{bmatrix} -2 & 3 \\ 0 & 4 \end{bmatrix}$ dan $C = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & -4 \\ 2 & 2 \end{bmatrix}$. Jika $(A^{-1} \cdot B)^{-1} = C$, tentukan matriks $A$.
contoh.p: $$\begin{align*} (A^{-1} \cdot B)^{-1} &= C \\ B^{-1} \cdot (A^{-1})^{-1} &= C \quad \text{(sifat: $(PQ)^{-1} = Q^{-1}P^{-1}$)} \\ B^{-1} \cdot A &= C \quad \text{(karena $(A^{-1})^{-1} = A$)} \\ A &= B \cdot C \end{align*}$$ $$A = \begin{bmatrix} -2 & 3 \\ 0 & 4 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 1 & -4 \\ 2 & 2 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 4 & 14 \\ 8 & 8 \end{bmatrix}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 27
contoh.p: $$\begin{align*} (A^{-1} \cdot C)^{-1}(A^{-1} \cdot B) &= D \\ C^{-1}(A^{-1})^{-1} \cdot A^{-1} \cdot B &= D \\ C^{-1} \cdot A \cdot A^{-1} \cdot B &= D \\ C^{-1} \cdot B &= D \;\Rightarrow\; B = C \cdot D \end{align*}$$ $$B = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & 1 \\ 5 & 3 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} -2 & 0 \\ 1 & 4 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} -3 & 4 \\ -7 & 12 \end{bmatrix}$$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 28
contoh.q: Tentukan invers dari $A = \begin{bmatrix} 1 & -2 & 1 \\ 2 & -3 & 2 \\ 0 & -5 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$ dengan metode reduksi baris.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 29
contoh.p:
Minor dan Kofaktor: $$\begin{align*} M_{11} &= \begin{vmatrix} -3 & 1 \\ 2 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = -8 &\Rightarrow C_{11} &= -8 \\ M_{12} &= \begin{vmatrix} 2 & 1 \\ -1 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = 5 &\Rightarrow C_{12} &= -5 \\ M_{13} &= \begin{vmatrix} 2 & -3 \\ -1 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = 1 &\Rightarrow C_{13} &= 1 \\ M_{21} &= \begin{vmatrix} -5 & 0 \\ 2 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = -10 &\Rightarrow C_{21} &= 10 \\ M_{22} &= \begin{vmatrix} 3 & 0 \\ -1 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = 6 &\Rightarrow C_{22} &= 6 \\ M_{23} &= \begin{vmatrix} 3 & -5 \\ -1 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = 1 &\Rightarrow C_{23} &= -1 \\ M_{31} &= \begin{vmatrix} -5 & 0 \\ -3 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = -5 &\Rightarrow C_{31} &= -5 \\ M_{32} &= \begin{vmatrix} 3 & 0 \\ 2 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = 3 &\Rightarrow C_{32} &= -3 \\ M_{33} &= \begin{vmatrix} 3 & -5 \\ 2 & -3 \end{vmatrix} = 1 &\Rightarrow C_{33} &= 1 \end{align*}$$ $\det(A) = (3)(-8) + (-5)(-5) + (0)(1) = -24 + 25 + 0 = 1$

$\text{adj}(A) = C^{\mathrm{T}} = \begin{bmatrix} -8 & 10 & -5 \\ -5 & 6 & -3 \\ 1 & -1 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$, $\quad A^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{1}\begin{bmatrix} -8 & 10 & -5 \\ -5 & 6 & -3 \\ 1 & -1 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 30
contoh.p:
Kofaktor: $$\begin{align*} C_{11} &= +\begin{vmatrix} 2 & 1 \\ 3 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = -1, \quad C_{12} = -\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 1 \\ -1 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = -2 \\ C_{13} &= +\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ -1 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = 5, \quad C_{21} = -\begin{vmatrix} 3 & 3 \\ 3 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = 6 \\ C_{22} &= +\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 3 \\ -1 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = 4, \quad C_{23} = -\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 3 \\ -1 & 3 \end{vmatrix} = -6 \\ C_{31} &= +\begin{vmatrix} 3 & 3 \\ 2 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = -3, \quad C_{32} = -\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 3 \\ 1 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = 2 \\ C_{33} &= +\begin{vmatrix} 1 & 3 \\ 1 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = -1 \end{align*}$$ $\det(A) = 1(-1) + 3(-2) + 3(5) = -1 - 6 + 15 = 8$

$\text{adj}(A) = C^{\mathrm{T}} = \begin{bmatrix} -1 & 6 & -3 \\ -2 & 4 & 2 \\ 5 & -6 & -1 \end{bmatrix}$, $\quad A^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{8}\begin{bmatrix} -1 & 6 & -3 \\ -2 & 4 & 2 \\ 5 & -6 & -1 \end{bmatrix}$

sections.title: Menyelesaikan Sistem Persamaan Linear dengan Matriks

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 31
contoh.q: Tentukan himpunan penyelesaian $2x - 3y = 8$ dan $x + 2y = -3$ dengan kedua metode.
contoh.p:
(a) Metode invers: $\det(A) = (2)(2) - (-3)(1) = 7$ $$\begin{bmatrix} x \\ y \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 2 & 3 \\ -1 & 2 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 8 \\ -3 \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 7 \\ -14 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 1 \\ -2 \end{bmatrix}$$ (b) Metode Cramer: $D = 7$, $D_x = \begin{vmatrix} 8 & -3 \\ -3 & 2 \end{vmatrix} = 16 - 9 = 7$, $D_y = \begin{vmatrix} 2 & 8 \\ 1 & -3 \end{vmatrix} = -6 - 8 = -14$

$x = \dfrac{7}{7} = 1$, $\quad y = \dfrac{-14}{7} = -2$. Jadi $x = 1$ dan $y = -2$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 32
contoh.p:
Ubah ke bentuk standar: $-x + 2y = 10$ dan $3x - 2y = -18$.

$D = \begin{vmatrix} -1 & 2 \\ 3 & -2 \end{vmatrix} = 2 - 6 = -4$; $\quad D_x = \begin{vmatrix} 10 & 2 \\ -18 & -2 \end{vmatrix} = -20+36 = 16$; $\quad D_y = \begin{vmatrix} -1 & 10 \\ 3 & -18 \end{vmatrix} = 18-30 = -12$.

$x = \dfrac{16}{-4} = -4$, $\quad y = \dfrac{-12}{-4} = 3$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 33
contoh.q: Tentukan penyelesaian $2y - 3x = -4$ dan $2x + y = 5$ dengan kedua metode.
contoh.p:
Ubah ke bentuk standar: $3x - 2y = 4$ dan $2x + y = 5$.

(a) Metode invers: $A = \begin{bmatrix} 3 & -2 \\ 2 & 1 \end{bmatrix}$, $\det(A) = 7$ $$A^{-1} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ -2 & 3 \end{bmatrix}, \quad \begin{bmatrix} x \\ y \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 1 & 2 \\ -2 & 3 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} 4 \\ 5 \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 14 \\ 7 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} 2 \\ 1 \end{bmatrix}$$ (b) Metode Cramer: $$\begin{align*} D &= 7, \quad D_x = \begin{vmatrix} 4 & -2 \\ 5 & 1 \end{vmatrix} = 14, \quad D_y = \begin{vmatrix} 3 & 4 \\ 2 & 5 \end{vmatrix} = 7 \end{align*}$$ $x = \dfrac{14}{7} = 2$, $\quad y = \dfrac{7}{7} = 1$. Jadi $x = 2$ dan $y = 1$.

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 34
contoh.q: Tentukan himpunan penyelesaian dengan metode determinan: $\begin{cases} x + 2y + z = 2 \\ x - y - 2z = -1 \\ x + y - z = 3 \end{cases}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 35
contoh.q: Selesaikan SPL berikut menggunakan metode invers matriks: $\begin{cases} x + y - 2z = 2 \\ x - 3y + z = -3 \\ x - y + z = 1 \end{cases}$

contoh.label: 📘 Contoh 36
contoh.q: Selesaikan dengan metode invers matriks: $\begin{cases} 2x - 3y + 2z = -3 \\ x + 2y + z = 2 \\ 2x - y + 3z = 1 \end{cases}$
contoh.p:
$A = \begin{bmatrix} 2 & -3 & 2 \\ 1 & 2 & 1 \\ 2 & -1 & 3 \end{bmatrix}$

Kofaktor: $$\begin{align*} C_{11} &= +\begin{vmatrix}2&1\\-1&3\end{vmatrix} = 7, \quad C_{12} = -\begin{vmatrix}1&1\\2&3\end{vmatrix} = -1 \\ C_{13} &= +\begin{vmatrix}1&2\\2&-1\end{vmatrix} = -5, \quad C_{21} = -\begin{vmatrix}-3&2\\-1&3\end{vmatrix} = 7 \\ C_{22} &= +\begin{vmatrix}2&2\\2&3\end{vmatrix} = 2, \quad C_{23} = -\begin{vmatrix}2&-3\\2&-1\end{vmatrix} = -4 \\ C_{31} &= +\begin{vmatrix}-3&2\\2&1\end{vmatrix} = -7, \quad C_{32} = -\begin{vmatrix}2&2\\1&1\end{vmatrix} = 0 \\ C_{33} &= +\begin{vmatrix}2&-3\\1&2\end{vmatrix} = 7 \end{align*}$$ $\det(A) = 2(7) + (-3)(-1) + 2(-5) = 7$

$\text{adj}(A) = C^{\mathrm{T}} = \begin{bmatrix} 7 & 7 & -7 \\ -1 & 2 & 0 \\ -5 & -4 & 7 \end{bmatrix}$, $\quad A^{-1} = \dfrac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 7 & 7 & -7 \\ -1 & 2 & 0 \\ -5 & -4 & 7 \end{bmatrix}$ $$\begin{bmatrix} x \\ y \\ z \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} 7 & 7 & -7 \\ -1 & 2 & 0 \\ -5 & -4 & 7 \end{bmatrix}\begin{bmatrix} -3 \\ 2 \\ 1 \end{bmatrix} = \frac{1}{7}\begin{bmatrix} -14 \\ 7 \\ 14 \end{bmatrix} = \begin{bmatrix} -2 \\ 1 \\ 2 \end{bmatrix}$$ Jadi $x = -2$, $y = 1$, $z = 2$.
